name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W214/S214 plug-in hybrid (2.0L 4-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M254-based four-cylinder PHEV: ASSYST typically 15,000 km or 12 months when combustion engine mileage accumulates.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Cabin dust filter per Mercedes maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Petrol engine air filter at standard inspection intervals.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Regen extends pad life; inspections remain mandatory.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Four-cylinder PHEV: 60,000 km / 48 months orientation—verify ASSYST.
serviceNotes.coolant: Engine coolant circuit per Mercedes long-life interval.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: HV circuits per high-voltage supplement; ~120,000 km typical planning—qualified workshop only.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: Hybrid-integrated automatic: preventive ATF ~60,000 km specialist recommendation.
serviceNotes.transfer case oil: 4MATIC E 300 e variants only; ~60,000 km preventive.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary engine coolant ~120,000 km if not yet due.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection PHEV: intake cleaning ~120,000 km if carbon symptoms appear.
